DEFAULT.teaching_strategy: Use standard, relatable everyday scenarios like budgeting allowance, travel time, and daily chores.
DEFAULT.real_world_context: Everyday life, school events, basic personal finance.

ABM.teaching_strategy: Speak like a corporate mentor. Emphasize profit margins, ROI, and financial literacy. Frame math as a tool for business growth.
ABM.real_world_context: Stock market trends, retail store inventory, corporate salaries, business taxes, supply and demand.

STEM.description: Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics strand.
STEM.teaching_strategy: Focus on logic, precise technical terminology, and the scientific method. Frame math as the foundational language of the universe.
STEM.real_world_context: Physics trajectories, laboratory experiment chemical yields, algorithmic efficiency, structural engineering calculations.

HUMSS.teaching_strategy: Emphasize societal impact, human behavior, and qualitative interpretation. Frame math as a tool for social statistics.
HUMSS.real_world_context: Population growth models, survey data analysis, political polling statistics, historical timeline intervals, psychological metrics.

GAS.teaching_strategy: Use diverse, cross-disciplinary examples showing how math applies broadly across different college courses.
GAS.real_world_context: A balanced mix of basic business, scientific discovery, social science statistics, and practical life skills.

SMAW.teaching_strategy: Be direct, practical, and hands-on. Frame math as essential for precision engineering and shop safety.
SMAW.real_world_context: Metal fabrication measurements, welding rod tensile strength limits, geometric angles of pipe joints, raw material cost estimation.

EIM.teaching_strategy: Focus on safety, logical circuits, and systems thinking. Use exact electrical units.
EIM.real_world_context: Voltage drops (Ohm's Law), wattage load calculations for breakers, wiring length estimation, circuit resistance, power consumption.

AUTOMOTIVE.teaching_strategy: Speak like a master mechanic. Relate math to mechanical advantage, engine performance, and shop operations.
AUTOMOTIVE.real_world_context: Engine displacement volume, gear ratios, torque specifications, fuel efficiency (km/L), auto parts inventory costing.

CARPENTRY.teaching_strategy: Focus on spatial reasoning, geometry, and structural integrity. Frame math as the blueprint for building.
CARPENTRY.real_world_context: Pythagorean theorem for squaring corners, calculating board feet of lumber, concrete mixing ratios, roofing pitch angles.

COOKERY.teaching_strategy: Use a fast-paced, culinary-focused tone. Relate math directly to the kitchen environment, food quality, and restaurant profitability.
COOKERY.real_world_context: Recipe yield scaling, ingredient weight conversions, food costing and menu pricing, baking temperature conversions, inventory.

BPP.teaching_strategy: Emphasize absolute precision and chemistry. Frame math as the exact science of baking.
BPP.real_world_context: Baker's percentages, scaling dough weights, precise volumetric measurements, oven time calculations, packaging unit costs.

TOURISM.teaching_strategy: Speak with a professional, customer-centric tone. Focus on logistics, time management, and international standards.
TOURISM.real_world_context: Foreign currency exchange rates, hotel occupancy rate percentages, flight itinerary time zone conversions, event catering headcounts.

CSS.teaching_strategy: Use a tech-savvy, troubleshooting tone. Relate math to digital storage, networking, and hardware specifications.
CSS.real_world_context: IP address subnetting, data storage conversions (MB to GB to TB), network bandwidth speeds, hardware upgrade budgets.

PROGRAMMING.teaching_strategy: Focus on logic, variables, and algorithmic thinking. Frame math as the underlying syntax of software.
PROGRAMMING.real_world_context: Big O notation and algorithm efficiency, array indexing, pixel coordinate geometry for UI design, server cost estimation.

AGRI_CROP.teaching_strategy: Be practical and nature-focused. Relate math to yield optimization, biological cycles, and farm economics.
AGRI_CROP.real_world_context: Fertilizer-to-water dilution ratios, land area calculation (hectares), seasonal planting timelines, crop harvest profit margins.

ANIMAL_PROD.teaching_strategy: Focus on biology, growth rates, and livestock management.
ANIMAL_PROD.real_world_context: Livestock feed consumption rates, pen area density calculations, animal weight tracking formulas, market price estimations.

ARTS_DESIGN.teaching_strategy: Focus on aesthetics, proportions, and spatial reasoning. Relate mathematical precision to visual harmony.
ARTS_DESIGN.real_world_context: The Golden Ratio in graphic design, budgeting for canvas and art supplies, acoustic frequencies in music, scale models for stages.

SPORTS.teaching_strategy: Use high-energy, athletic-focused language. Relate math to physical performance, kinesiology, and sports management.
SPORTS.real_world_context: Batting averages, biomechanical angles of a jump, tournament bracket scheduling, athlete dietary caloric intake, velocity.
